title: Bed Wars Items
description: Adds several famous items from popular Bedwars servers through a simple plugin.
body:
This plugin adds several custom items from popular Bedwars servers. These are: Bridge Egg, Fireball, Dream Defender, Bed Bug and Auto Light TNT. You can obtain one of each of these items by doing their respective commands: /bedautotnt, /bedbridgeegg, /beddreamdefender, /bedfireball and /bedbedbug. Or to obtain multiple of each item from within one interface do /beditemscommand which opens this GUI. ![A GUI with all the Bed Wars Items in.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeaaf4d6206cc8ff3e2db85a1def5e12197da54d.png)
All of the commands above require you to have operator to run them.
There are adjustable settings in the config file of the plugin. ![What the config file looks like.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eb3f3d3ebb4f9059ab4e9f769b072670ad43aee.png)
